race.comment: WOODROW (1) has hit the top-four in all five career outings to date and looks to be knocking on the door of a maiden victory. Gets 2kg weight relief with the claim and should be right there when the whips are cracking. THE AVIATOR (3) has placed three of four this time in work and maps ideally for this from gate two. Can make his presence felt. SATURDAYS GIRL (4) is unlucky to still be a maiden finishing runner-up at her past three starts and strikes a very winnable contest here. Include in calculations. DELICIOUS DEREK (6) gets Maloney on board from the inside alley and must be respected out of the champion Waller barn. In the mix.
